trigger_keywords: fermentar a temperaturas bajas en vinos blancos

steps.label: cause
steps.text: White or aromatic must ferments at a relatively low controlled temperature.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Cooler fermentation slows yeast activity and reduces the volatilisation and rapid transformation of delicate aroma compounds.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: More fresh, delicate fruit and floral aromas are retained in the finished wine.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: More fresh, delicate fruit and floral aromas are retained in the finished wine.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
